name: Paysafe
description: Paysafe is an integrated payment platform providing businesses with REST APIs for online payments, digital wallets, prepaid cards, pay-by-cash processing, and merchant account management.

itemListElement.name: Paysafe Payments API
itemListElement.description: Core REST API to process payments across 100+ methods including cards, bank transfers, cash vouchers, digital wallets, and crypto.

itemListElement.name: Paysafe 3D Secure API
itemListElement.description: 3D Secure v2 API providing PSD2-compliant strong customer authentication (SCA) for card transactions.

itemListElement.name: Paysafe Payment Scheduler API
itemListElement.description: REST API for creating and managing recurring payment plans and customer subscriptions.

itemListElement.name: Paysafe Applications API
itemListElement.description: REST API for platforms and payment facilitators to create white-labelled merchant onboarding experiences.

itemListElement.name: Paysafe Embedded Wallets API
itemListElement.description: REST API enabling platforms to embed digital wallet functionality with prepaid cards and crypto on-ramp.

itemListElement.name: PaysafeCard REST API
itemListElement.description: API enabling merchants to accept PaysafeCard prepaid voucher payments, payouts, and refunds.

itemListElement.name: Paysafe FX Rates API
itemListElement.description: REST API providing foreign exchange rate data for multi-currency payment processing and dynamic currency conversion.
